hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$(basename "$f")" in *-gcp-bucket.json|ff-auto-drive.json|*credentials*.json|*service_account*.json|.env|.env.*|*.env|*.env.*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"This file is a secret/credential file and is blocked from agent read/write."}}';; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) [ -x frontend/node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && frontend/node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && { ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; ruff check --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; } ;; esac; exit 0
